channel.title: Official PlayStation Podcast
channel.itunes:summary: Get exclusive first details on next week's PSN game lineup from the staff of the official PlayStation.Blog, and stick around for PlayStation news, answers to questions from the PlayStation community, and plenty of nerdy game talk. Join us!
channel.itunes:author: PlayStation
channel.description: Get exclusive first details on next week's PSN game lineup from the staff of the official PlayStation.Blog, and stick around for PlayStation news, answers to questions from the PlayStation community, and plenty of nerdy game talk. Join us!

item.title: Episode 536: Legendary Cooperation
item.itunes:title: Episode 536: Legendary Cooperation
item.description: Hey, everybody! Tim and O'Dell are back this week to talk about the games they are playing, a busy news week, and some big contenders that are releasing soon. This week also features an interview with Darren Bridges, Lead Designer, Sucker Punch, for Ghost of Yōtei Legends.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Tim and O'Dell are back this week to talk about the games they are playing, a busy news week, and some big contenders that are releasing soon. This week also features an interview with Darren Bridges, Lead Designer, Sucker Punch, for Ghost of Yōtei Legends.

item.title: Episode 535: Returning Residents
item.itunes:title: Episode 535: Returning Residents
item.description: Hey, everybody! Tim, Kristen, and O'Dell are back this week to talk about the horrors of Racoon City, Reanimal, and trying to conquer your backlog before a wave of new games comes for us all. Along with our various journeys through Greece in God of War Sons of Sparta.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Tim, Kristen, and O'Dell are back this week to talk about the horrors of Racoon City, Reanimal, and trying to conquer your backlog before a wave of new games comes for us all. Along with our various journeys through Greece in God of War Sons of Sparta.

item.title: Episode 534: State of Sparta
item.itunes:title: Episode 534: State of Sparta
item.description: Hey, everybody! Brett, Kristen, and O'Dell are back this week to talk about this week's State of Play, along with all the exciting announcements that came with it. To celebrate the surprise launch of God of War Sons of Sparta, we have a special interview with developer Mega Cat Studios: Game Director Zack Manko and Founder/CEO James Deighan.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Brett, Kristen, and O'Dell are back this week to talk about this week's State of Play, along with all the exciting announcements that came with it. To celebrate the surprise launch of God of War Sons of Sparta, we have a special interview with developer Mega Cat Studios: Game Director Zack Manko and Founder/CEO James Deighan.

item.title: Episode 533: John Carpentry 101
item.itunes:title: Episode 533: John Carpentry 101
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, Tim, Brett, and O'Dell are back this week to talk about the newest game announced this week, Horizon Hunters Gathering, take a look at what's new in MLB The Show 26, and go down the rabbit hole of games based on 80s action.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, Tim, Brett, and O'Dell are back this week to talk about the newest game announced this week, Horizon Hunters Gathering, take a look at what's new in MLB The Show 26, and go down the rabbit hole of games based on 80s action.

item.title: Episode 532: Refreshed, Rejuvenated
item.itunes:title: Episode 532: Refreshed, Rejuvenated
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, Kristen, and O'Dell are back this week to talk about the new Marathon DualSense and all the new info surrounding the title, a look at how remakes and remasters have brought many respected classics to the forefront, and our current gaming adventures.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, Kristen, and O'Dell are back this week to talk about the new Marathon DualSense and all the new info surrounding the title, a look at how remakes and remasters have brought many respected classics to the forefront, and our current gaming adventures.

item.title: Episode 531: Dispatching The New Year
item.itunes:title: Episode 531: Dispatching The New Year
item.description: Hey, everybody! Tim, Kristen, and O'Dell are back this week to finish discussing our top games of 2025, take a look at the new Hyperpop Collection, and look forward to another great year of gaming.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Tim, Kristen, and O'Dell are back this week to finish discussing our top games of 2025, take a look at the new Hyperpop Collection, and look forward to another great year of gaming.

item.title: Episode 530: Wrapped With a Bow
item.itunes:title: Episode 530: Wrapped With a Bow
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, Kristen, and Brett are back this week to discuss their top games of 2025, both in terms of hours played and the ones they can't stop thinking about. This episode also includes a spoiler-filled Ghost of Yōtei interview with Sucker Punch Creative Directors Jason Connell and Nate Fox.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, Kristen, and Brett are back this week to discuss their top games of 2025, both in terms of hours played and the ones they can't stop thinking about. This episode also includes a spoiler-filled Ghost of Yōtei interview with Sucker Punch Creative Directors Jason Connell and Nate Fox.

item.title: Episode 529: Sumptuous Victuals
item.itunes:title: Episode 529: Sumptuous Victuals
item.description: Hey, y'all! Sid, Tim, Brett, and Kristen are back this week after the Thanksgiving holiday, and diving right into Arc Raiders and Ghost of Yōtei NG+.
item.content:encoded: Hey, y'all! Sid, Tim, Brett, and Kristen are back this week after the Thanksgiving holiday, and diving right into Arc Raiders and Ghost of Yōtei NG+.

item.title: Episode 528: Raiders of the lost Arc
item.itunes:title: Episode 528: Raiders of the lost Arc
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, Tim, and Kristen are back this week to discuss this week's State of Play Japan, which focuses on the Japanese and Asian markets, the thrill of going topside in Arc Raiders, and all the games the team has been playing and looking forward to.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, Tim, and Kristen are back this week to discuss this week's State of Play Japan, which focuses on the Japanese and Asian markets, the thrill of going topside in Arc Raiders, and all the games the team has been playing and looking forward to.

item.title: Episode 527: Pod x Pit
item.itunes:title: Episode 527: Pod x Pit
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, Tim, and Brett are back this week to talk about the new indie darling Ball x Pit, the long journey to a Death Stranding 2 platinum, Silent Hill f, and the Battlefield series' first battle royale foray.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, Tim, and Brett are back this week to talk about the new indie darling Ball x Pit, the long journey to a Death Stranding 2 platinum, Silent Hill f, and the Battlefield series' first battle royale foray.

item.title: Episode 526: Lost in the Game Sauce
item.itunes:title: Episode 526: Lost in the Game Sauce
item.description: Hey, everybody! Kristen and I are back this week to talk about some of our favorite armor builds in Ghost of Yōtei, our favorite original in-universe games within video games, and the current titles holding our attention.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Kristen and I are back this week to talk about some of our favorite armor builds in Ghost of Yōtei, our favorite original in-universe games within video games, and the current titles holding our attention.

item.title: Episode 525: Ghost Season
item.itunes:title: Episode 525: Ghost Season
item.description: Hey, everybody! Kristen and O'Dell are back this week to celebrate the launch of Ghost of Yōtei, discuss upcoming releases, and share the latest news. This episode also includes an interview with Erika Ishii, voice of Atsu from Ghost of Yōtei.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Kristen and O'Dell are back this week to celebrate the launch of Ghost of Yōtei, discuss upcoming releases, and share the latest news. This episode also includes an interview with Erika Ishii, voice of Atsu from Ghost of Yōtei.

item.title: Episode 524: Stately Steps
item.itunes:title: Episode 524: Stately Steps
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the new upcoming Ghost of Yōtei merch, TGS, and recapping this week's State of Play. This episode also includes an interview with Gabe Cuzzillo, one of the three developers of the PS5 title Baby Steps.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the new upcoming Ghost of Yōtei merch, TGS, and recapping this week's State of Play. This episode also includes an interview with Gabe Cuzzillo, one of the three developers of the PS5 title Baby Steps.

item.title: Episode 523: Memory Cards
item.itunes:title: Episode 523: Memory Cards
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, Tim, and Brett are back this week to discuss the release of Borderlands 4, indie hit Hollow Knight: Silksong, and 30 years of PlayStation memories.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, Tim, and Brett are back this week to discuss the release of Borderlands 4, indie hit Hollow Knight: Silksong, and 30 years of PlayStation memories.

item.title: Episode 522: Silence, Snakes, and Swords
item.itunes:title: Episode 522: Silence, Snakes, and Swords
item.description: Hey, everybody! Kristen, Tim, and O'Dell are back this week to discuss taking up the mantle of Big Boss in Metal Gear Solid Delta: Snake Eater, soul surfing in Sword of the Sea, the biggest news stories of the week, and more.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Kristen, Tim, and O'Dell are back this week to discuss taking up the mantle of Big Boss in Metal Gear Solid Delta: Snake Eater, soul surfing in Sword of the Sea, the biggest news stories of the week, and more.

item.title: Episode 521: Meet Space
item.itunes:title: Episode 521: Meet Space
item.description: Hey friends! This week Tim, Brett, and Sid are back with exciting PlayStation Plus Game Catalog news for August, some early Battlefield 6 thoughts, and ideas for gaming-themed tattoos.
item.content:encoded: Hey friends! This week Tim, Brett, and Sid are back with exciting PlayStation Plus Game Catalog news for August, some early Battlefield 6 thoughts, and ideas for gaming-themed tattoos.

item.title: Episode 520: Four on the Floor
item.itunes:title: Episode 520: Four on the Floor
item.description: Hey, everybody! Kristen, Tim, Brett, and Sid are back this week to discuss Heretic + Hexen remastered by Nightdive Studios, the multiplayer reveal for Battlefield 6, and much more.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Kristen, Tim, Brett, and Sid are back this week to discuss Heretic + Hexen remastered by Nightdive Studios, the multiplayer reveal for Battlefield 6, and much more.

item.title: Episode 519: Ghost in the Canvas
item.itunes:title: Episode 519: Ghost in the Canvas
item.description: Hey, everybody! Kristen, Tim, and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the Ghost of Yōtei State of Play that featured an in-depth look at gameplay, the moral ramifications of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33's ending, and our current gaming adventures.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Kristen, Tim, and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the Ghost of Yōtei State of Play that featured an in-depth look at gameplay, the moral ramifications of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33's ending, and our current gaming adventures.

item.title: Episode 518: Expedition Connection
item.itunes:title: Episode 518: Expedition Connection
item.description: Hey, everybody! Kristen and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the adventures of making deliveries in Death Stranding 2: On the Beach, the range of emotions kindled by Clair Obscur: Expedition 33, and some of our favorite PlayStation merch.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Kristen and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the adventures of making deliveries in Death Stranding 2: On the Beach, the range of emotions kindled by Clair Obscur: Expedition 33, and some of our favorite PlayStation merch.

item.title: Episode 517: Shocking Developments
item.itunes:title: Episode 517: Shocking Developments
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid and Tim are back this week to discuss the foundation System Shock 2 laid for gaming generations to come, recap what the team saw at Summer Game Fest, and their latest gaming adventures.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid and Tim are back this week to discuss the foundation System Shock 2 laid for gaming generations to come, recap what the team saw at Summer Game Fest, and their latest gaming adventures.

item.title: Episode 516: All Aboard the Nightreign
item.itunes:title: Episode 516: All Aboard the Nightreign
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid and Tim are back this week to discuss trying to survive the long nights of Elden Ring Nightreign and celebrate the 30th State of Play while going over their favorite reveals.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid and Tim are back this week to discuss trying to survive the long nights of Elden Ring Nightreign and celebrate the 30th State of Play while going over their favorite reveals.

item.title: Episode 515: Long Live Super Mirth
item.itunes:title: Episode 515: Long Live Super Mirth
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, Brett, and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the latest news and what games currently have them locked in. This episode also includes interviews with Arrowhead Game Studios Production Director Alex Bolle and Design Director Niklas Malmborg.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, Brett, and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the latest news and what games currently have them locked in. This episode also includes interviews with Arrowhead Game Studios Production Director Alex Bolle and Design Director Niklas Malmborg.

item.title: Episode 514: 33 and a Third
item.itunes:title: Episode 514: 33 and a Third
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, Tim, and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the new Grand Theft Auto VI trailer, explore how Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 innovates on the turn-based RPG formula, and the ways Doom: The Dark Ages goes medieval.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, Tim, and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the new Grand Theft Auto VI trailer, explore how Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 innovates on the turn-based RPG formula, and the ways Doom: The Dark Ages goes medieval.

item.title: Episode 513: Doomed Days
item.itunes:title: Episode 513: Doomed Days
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, Brett, and Tim are back this week to discuss the release date reveal and new trailer for Ghost of Yōtei. This episode also includes interviews with Doom: The Dark Ages Director Hugo Martin and Days Gone Remastered Creative and Product Lead Kevin McAllister.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, Brett, and Tim are back this week to discuss the release date reveal and new trailer for Ghost of Yōtei. This episode also includes interviews with Doom: The Dark Ages Director Hugo Martin and Days Gone Remastered Creative and Product Lead Kevin McAllister.

item.title: Episode 512: True Blue
item.itunes:title: Episode 512: True Blue
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, Kristen, Tim, and I are back this week to discuss Days Gone Remastered and the new hit indie game Blue Prince. We also get Tim's top five most-played PlayStation games and discover what new titles everyone has been checking out.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, Kristen, Tim, and I are back this week to discuss Days Gone Remastered and the new hit indie game Blue Prince. We also get Tim's top five most-played PlayStation games and discover what new titles everyone has been checking out.

item.title: Episode 511: High Five
item.itunes:title: Episode 511: High Five
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, Kristen, Brett, and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the new take on Pac-Man Shadow Labyrinth, the wonders of hand-tracking in PlayStation VR2, what it's like to learn how to walk in Baby Steps, and their most played games on PlayStation.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, Kristen, Brett, and O'Dell are back this week to discuss the new take on Pac-Man Shadow Labyrinth, the wonders of hand-tracking in PlayStation VR2, what it's like to learn how to walk in Baby Steps, and their most played games on PlayStation.

item.title: Episode 510: Cereal Monsters
item.itunes:title: Episode 510: Cereal Monsters
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, O'Dell, Tim, and Brett are back this week to discuss MLB The Show 25 early access, including an interview with San Diego Studio Gameplay Director Chris Gill. The crew also swaps Monster Hunter Wilds stories and highlights this week's news.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, O'Dell, Tim, and Brett are back this week to discuss MLB The Show 25 early access, including an interview with San Diego Studio Gameplay Director Chris Gill. The crew also swaps Monster Hunter Wilds stories and highlights this week's news.

item.title: Episode 509: Here Be Monsters
item.itunes:title: Episode 509: Here Be Monsters
item.description: Hey, everybody! Sid, O'Dell, Kristen, and Brett discuss some of the newest releases, including Monster Hunter Wilds and Lost Records: Bloom & Rage - Tape 1, and break down the official LEGO Horizon Adventures playset.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Sid, O'Dell, Kristen, and Brett discuss some of the newest releases, including Monster Hunter Wilds and Lost Records: Bloom & Rage - Tape 1, and break down the official LEGO Horizon Adventures playset.

item.title: Episode 508: Come Back Stronger
item.itunes:title: Episode 508: Come Back Stronger
item.description: Hey, everybody! Tim and Kristen discuss all the big news for this week's State of Play, including Saros, the upcoming new game from Housemarque, and some of their other favorite moments from the show.
item.content:encoded: Hey, everybody! Tim and Kristen discuss all the big news for this week's State of Play, including Saros, the upcoming new game from Housemarque, and some of their other favorite moments from the show.

item.title: Episode 507: Rogue Metaphor
item.itunes:title: Episode 507: Rogue Metaphor
item.description: Howdy, folks! This week the crew sits down to talk about this week's news. This week, Tim and Kristen discuss their playthroughs of Dynasty Warriors: Origins, Alien: Rogue Incursion, and Metaphor: ReFantazio.
item.content:encoded: Howdy, folks! This week the crew sits down to talk about this week's news. This week, Tim and Kristen discuss their playthroughs of Dynasty Warriors: Origins, Alien: Rogue Incursion, and Metaphor: ReFantazio.

item.title: Episode 506: Marvelous Start
item.itunes:title: Episode 506: Marvelous Start
item.description: Howdy, folks! This week, the crew returns for the first show of 2025! Topics of discussion include Marvel Rivals and retro classics Final Fantasy 5 and the Contra series. Plus, Brett joins to close out the PlayStation 30th Anniversary discussion by sharing his favorite PS5 and PS VR2 games.
item.content:encoded: Howdy, folks! This week, the crew returns for the first show of 2025! Topics of discussion include Marvel Rivals and retro classics Final Fantasy 5 and the Contra series. Plus, Brett joins to close out the PlayStation 30th Anniversary discussion by sharing his favorite PS5 and PS VR2 games.

item.title: Episode 505: Cheers to 2024
item.itunes:title: Episode 505: Cheers to 2024
item.description:
Hello folks! This week, the crew shares their favorite games of the year in the final show of 2024. Plus, Kristen returns to share her top games from past PlayStation console generations to celebrate the 30th anniversary.

 

Thank you to all the developers who made this such a special year in gaming and to all the listeners for coming along for the ride. Here's to a great year in gaming for 2025!
item.content:encoded:
Hello folks! This week, the crew shares their favorite games of the year in the final show of 2024. Plus, Kristen returns to share her top games from past PlayStation console generations to celebrate the 30th anniversary.

Thank you to all the developers who made this such a special year in gaming and to all the listeners for coming along for the ride. Here's to a great year in gaming for 2025!

item.title: Episode 504: Celebrating 30 Years of PlayStation (Part 4)
item.itunes:title: Episode 504: Celebrating 30 Years of PlayStation (Part 4)
item.description: Hey gang! This week, Final Fantasy creator Hironobu Sakaguchi stops by to discuss his latest game, Fantasian Neo Dimension. Plus, the PlayStation 30th anniversary celebration continues as the crew shares their favorite games on PS5 and PS VR2. Through the end of the year, we'll continue featuring picks from listeners and developers (and Kristen will return to share her top PlayStation games from the past 30 years).
item.content:encoded: Hey gang! This week, Final Fantasy creator Hironobu Sakaguchi stops by to discuss his latest game, Fantasian Neo Dimension. Plus, the PlayStation 30th anniversary celebration continues as the crew shares their favorite games on PS5 and PS VR2. Through the end of the year, we'll continue featuring picks from listeners and developers (and Kristen will return to share her top PlayStation games from the past 30 years).

item.title: Episode 503: Celebrating 30 Years of PlayStation (Part 3)
item.itunes:title: Episode 503: Celebrating 30 Years of PlayStation (Part 3)
item.description: Howdy folks! The PlayStation 30th anniversary celebration continues this week as the crew hears from listeners and developers about their favorite PlayStation games of all time. Plus, the crew dives into their favorite games on PS Vita, PS4, and PS VR. We'll continue to feature listeners and developers (and name our personal top picks for PS5 and PS VR2 games!) through the end of the year.
item.content:encoded: Howdy folks! The PlayStation 30th anniversary celebration continues this week as the crew hears from listeners and developers about their favorite PlayStation games of all time. Plus, the crew dives into their favorite games on PS Vita, PS4, and PS VR. We'll continue to feature listeners and developers (and name our personal top picks for PS5 and PS VR2 games!) through the end of the year.

item.title: Episode 502: All Good Things
item.itunes:title: Episode 502: All Good Things
item.description:
Howdy folks! Friend of the podcast Shuhei Yoshida joins us to recap some of his biggest moments across 31 years of PlayStation, including his role as Head of Indies Initiative and his work with PlayStation Studios. Shu celebrates the highlights of his illustrious PlayStation career and discusses his favorite games of each PlayStation console generation. 

 

Plus, the team continues to feature listener and developer opinions on their favorite PlayStation memories. We'll continue to feature listeners and developers (and name our favorite PS Vita, PS4, and PS VR games!) leading up to PlayStation's 30th anniversary on December 3.
item.content:encoded:
Howdy folks! Friend of the podcast Shuhei Yoshida joins us to recap some of his biggest moments across 31 years of PlayStation, including his role as Head of Indies Initiative and his work with PlayStation Studios. Shu celebrates the highlights of his illustrious PlayStation career and discusses his favorite games of each PlayStation console generation.

Plus, the team continues to feature listener and developer opinions on their favorite PlayStation memories. We'll continue to feature listeners and developers (and name our favorite PS Vita, PS4, and PS VR games!) leading up to PlayStation's 30th anniversary on December 3.

item.title: Episode 501: Celebrating 30 Years of PlayStation (Part 2)
item.itunes:title: Episode 501: Celebrating 30 Years of PlayStation (Part 2)
item.description: What's up, gang! The festivities for PlayStation's 30th anniversary continue this week as the crew hears from listeners and developers about their favorite PlayStation games of all time. Plus, the crew dives into their favorite games on PSP and PS3. We'll continue to feature listeners and developers leading up to PlayStation's 30th anniversary on December 3 and beyond.
item.content:encoded: What's up, gang! The festivities for PlayStation's 30th anniversary continue this week as the crew hears from listeners and developers about their favorite PlayStation games of all time. Plus, the crew dives into their favorite games on PSP and PS3. We'll continue to feature listeners and developers leading up to PlayStation's 30th anniversary on December 3 and beyond.

item.title: Episode 500: Celebrating 30 Years of PlayStation (Part 1)
item.itunes:title: Episode 500: Celebrating 30 Years of PlayStation (Part 1)
item.description:
Hey y'all, Episode 500 is finally here! Thank you to all the loyal listeners for making this momentous episode possible. Can you believe the show started back in 2011? Whether you've been with us for the entire run or are a new listener, we appreciate you.

 

This week, the crew hears from listeners and developers about some of their favorite PlayStation games and memories. The podcast crew also dives into their favorite games on the original PlayStation and PlayStation 2. But the celebration doesn't end here! We'll continue to feature listeners and developers leading up to PlayStation's 30th anniversary on December 3.
item.content:encoded:
Hey y'all, Episode 500 is finally here! Thank you to all the loyal listeners for making this momentous episode possible. Can you believe the show started back in 2011? Whether you've been with us for the entire run or are a new listener, we appreciate you.

This week, the crew hears from listeners and developers about some of their favorite PlayStation games and memories. The podcast crew also dives into their favorite games on the original PlayStation and PlayStation 2. But the celebration doesn't end here! We'll continue to feature listeners and developers leading up to PlayStation's 30th anniversary on December 3.

item.title: Episode 499: Facehuggin' Fun
item.itunes:title: Episode 499: Facehuggin' Fun
item.description: Hey folks! This week the gang returns for a quick episode to discuss the news and upcoming releases. Plus, we get into hands-on impressions of the eerily immersive PS VR2 game Alien: Rogue Incursion coming in December.
item.content:encoded: Hey folks! This week the gang returns for a quick episode to discuss the news and upcoming releases. Plus, we get into hands-on impressions of the eerily immersive PS VR2 game Alien: Rogue Incursion coming in December.

item.title: Episode 498: Voice of the Veilguard
item.itunes:title: Episode 498: Voice of the Veilguard
item.description: Hey folks! This week the team got to sit down with Bioware Game Director Corinne Busche and Creative Director John Epler to talk Dragon Age: The Veilguard. We also discuss the newly released Dragon Ball: Sparking Zero and Fear the Spotlight.
item.content:encoded: Hey folks! This week the team got to sit down with Bioware Game Director Corinne Busche and Creative Director John Epler to talk Dragon Age: The Veilguard. We also discuss the newly released Dragon Ball: Sparking Zero and Fear the Spotlight.

item.title: Episode 497: Aim-Down-Sights on October Frights
item.itunes:title: Episode 497: Aim-Down-Sights on October Frights
item.description: Howdy, y'all! This week we got to sit down with Treyarch Associate Creative Director Miles Leslie to discuss Call of Duty: Black Ops 6. Plus, the team continues the spooky game spiel by diving into Until Dawn, Silent Hill 2, and more.
item.content:encoded: Howdy, y'all! This week we got to sit down with Treyarch Associate Creative Director Miles Leslie to discuss Call of Duty: Black Ops 6. Plus, the team continues the spooky game spiel by diving into Until Dawn, Silent Hill 2, and more.

item.title: Episode 496: Welcome to Silent Hill (2)
item.itunes:title: Episode 496: Welcome to Silent Hill (2)
item.description: Hey folks! We've got a full house for this week's pod, with the team talking news, next week's releases, and all the spooktacular games we've been playing this month, including Until Dawn and Silent Hill 2.
item.content:encoded: Hey folks! We've got a full house for this week's pod, with the team talking news, next week's releases, and all the spooktacular games we've been playing this month, including Until Dawn and Silent Hill 2.

item.title: Episode 495: Play Date
item.itunes:title: Episode 495: Play Date
item.description: Hello listeners, we've got a bunch to unpack! This week, the PlayStation Podcast team dives into some of the hottest reveals coming out of this week's news-packed State of Play. Plus, Sid discusses his recent hands-on experience with PS5 Pro launching on November 7.
item.content:encoded: Hello listeners, we've got a bunch to unpack! This week, the PlayStation Podcast team dives into some of the hottest reveals coming out of this week's news-packed State of Play. Plus, Sid discusses his recent hands-on experience with PS5 Pro launching on November 7.

item.title: Episode 494: Bot Thoughts
item.itunes:title: Episode 494: Bot Thoughts
item.description: Howdy folks! The PlayStation Podcast gang returns to continue the discussion on Astro Bot, including segments with and without spoilers. The team also talks Animal Well and A Short Hike.
item.content:encoded: Howdy folks! The PlayStation Podcast gang returns to continue the discussion on Astro Bot, including segments with and without spoilers. The team also talks Animal Well and A Short Hike.

item.title: Episode 493: The Joy of Astro Bot
item.itunes:title: Episode 493: The Joy of Astro Bot
item.description: Hey folks! This week the podcast crew got to sit down with Team Asobi Creative Director Nicolas Doucet and SIE Studio Business Group CEO Hermen Hulst to talk all things Astro Bot. Plus, we discuss a few games we've been playing including Star Wars Outlaws, Doom + Doom II, and of course sweet Astro Bot.
item.content:encoded: Hey folks! This week the podcast crew got to sit down with Team Asobi Creative Director Nicolas Doucet and SIE Studio Business Group CEO Hermen Hulst to talk all things Astro Bot. Plus, we discuss a few games we've been playing including Star Wars Outlaws, Doom + Doom II, and of course sweet Astro Bot.

item.title: Episode 491: Puzzling Platforms
item.itunes:title: Episode 491: Puzzling Platforms
item.description: Hey folks! The PlayStation Podcast crew punches in a quick episode covering this week's gaming news and upcoming releases. Plus discussions on Astro Bot, Monster Hunter Wilds, and Arranger: A Role-Puzzling Adventure.
item.content:encoded: Hey folks! The PlayStation Podcast crew punches in a quick episode covering this week's gaming news and upcoming releases. Plus discussions on Astro Bot, Monster Hunter Wilds, and Arranger: A Role-Puzzling Adventure.

item.title: Episode 491: Darkest Shadow
item.itunes:title: Episode 491: Darkest Shadow
item.description: Howdy folks! This week the PlayStation Podcast gang returns with a quick episode to discuss this week's news and new releases on the horizon. Plus the team talks Darkest Dungeon II, Elden Ring DLC, and Shadow the Hedgehog.
item.content:encoded: Howdy folks! This week the PlayStation Podcast gang returns with a quick episode to discuss this week's news and new releases on the horizon. Plus the team talks Darkest Dungeon II, Elden Ring DLC, and Shadow the Hedgehog.

item.title: Episode 490: Interview w/ Firewalk Studios on Concord
item.itunes:title: Episode 490: Interview w/ Firewalk Studios on Concord
item.description: Hey y'all! This week the PlayStation Podcast crew sits down with Firewalk Studios Lead Gameplay Designer Claude Jerome and Lead Character Designer Jon Weisnewski to talk all things Concord. Plus, the team dives into their experiences with the Concord Early Access Beta and discusses Tekken's 30th anniversary.
item.content:encoded: Hey y'all! This week the PlayStation Podcast crew sits down with Firewalk Studios Lead Gameplay Designer Claude Jerome and Lead Character Designer Jon Weisnewski to talk all things Concord. Plus, the team dives into their experiences with the Concord Early Access Beta and discusses Tekken's 30th anniversary.

item.title: Episode 489: Tame The Rage
item.itunes:title: Episode 489: Tame The Rage
item.description: Howdy! This week the PlayStation Podcast crew talks gamer rage, and the team sits down with Vertigo Games to discuss Metro Awakening's upcoming PS VR2 release. And of course, more Elden Ring DLC talk.
item.content:encoded: Howdy! This week the PlayStation Podcast crew talks gamer rage, and the team sits down with Vertigo Games to discuss Metro Awakening's upcoming PS VR2 release. And of course, more Elden Ring DLC talk.

item.title: Episode 488: Wacky Tacos
item.itunes:title: Episode 488: Wacky Tacos
item.description: Hey y'all! This week the team is delighted to discuss Astro Bot gameplay coming out of SGF. Plus, the team gets into a listener letter and closes out the show with some Elden Ring talk.
item.content:encoded: Hey y'all! This week the team is delighted to discuss Astro Bot gameplay coming out of SGF. Plus, the team gets into a listener letter and closes out the show with some Elden Ring talk.

item.title: Episode 487: Riot Requirements
item.itunes:title: Episode 487: Riot Requirements
item.description: Hey y'all! We've got a full show for you all this week, starting with a recap of the teams' hands-on experiences at Summer Game Fest. Plus, we got to sit down with Riot Games Production Director Arnar Gylfason to discuss Valorant coming to PS5 and the Limited Beta starting today.
item.content:encoded: Hey y'all! We've got a full show for you all this week, starting with a recap of the teams' hands-on experiences at Summer Game Fest. Plus, we got to sit down with Riot Games Production Director Arnar Gylfason to discuss Valorant coming to PS5 and the Limited Beta starting today.
